prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 等中南大学优势工科专业社会热度持续偏高；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定；土木建筑类社会热度明显降温。本省2026年物理类考生约25.14万人，较2025年24.98万 人微增约0.6%，竞争略有加剧；中南大学位于湖南省长沙市，与湖北省相邻，跨省报考的地域偏好适中；该校在湖北省物 理类招生计划约占其全国总计划的较小比例，近年招生人数稳中有升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类扩招约9.3%的缓解效应、本省考生微增的竞争压力、学校声誉偏负面但 学科实力强劲等因素，在；预测最低位次约7882名，区间7382–8382名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6992 → 7089 → 6817 → 7356 → 7436, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 620 positions in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is about 7436; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 195 in 2021, 186 in 2022, 190 in 2023, 190 in 2024, and 193 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 211, an increase of about 9.3% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable range of 23–27 in recent years, belonging to the top national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to the investigation of former president Zhang Yaoxue); Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 85th, rated as average); in 2024, there was moderate attention for abnormal admissions, and low attention in 2025, with no significant warming in overall application popularity; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Metallurgical Engineering and Nursing, A in Materials Science and Engineering, A- in Clinical Medicine, A- in Computer Science and Technology, etc., with outstanding disciplinary strength, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity remains high for Central South University's advantageous engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering; medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable popularity; civil engineering and architecture majors have significantly cooled. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is about 251,400, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 249,800 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, adjacent to Hubei Province, with moderate cross-provincial application preference; the university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Hubei accounts for a relatively small proportion of its national total, with stable and slightly increasing enrollment numbers in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the easing effect of a 9.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 for Physics Category, the slight increase in competition from provincial examinees, the somewhat negative reputation but strong disciplinary strength, etc.; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7882, with a range of 7382–8382.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking in the 23–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to the investigation of former president Zhang Yaoxue); Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 85th); the History Category enrollment majors are mainly economics, management, law, and humanities, with limited impact from the overall school reputation; Central South University's A- and above disciplines are mainly engineering and medicine, while History Category-related disciplines (such as Marxist Theory A-) provide some support for liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as law, Chinese language/literature are socially popular; finance/economics/economic majors are divided and wait-and-see. 预测结论.text: Considering the significant easing effect of the approximately 21.1% enrollment expansion in History Category in 2026 and the slight increase in competitive pressure from provincial examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2234, with a range of 1966–2502.
